overall.description: A small steam-powered boat navigates through a foggy industrial harbor filled with tall sailing ships and a large paddlewheel steamboat. The scene features heavy atmospheric haze with low morning sun creating a silhouetted, cinematic look characteristic of game engine footage.

segments.scene_description: The small steam boat moves steadily through open harbor waters toward a dense cluster of moored sailing ships. Morning sun creates a bright glare through the heavy fog, silhouetting the tall masts of a large docked vessel on the left and industrial smokestacks in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The boat turns right into a narrow channel between densely moored sailing vessels. The bright sun glare fades as the camera turns away from it, revealing industrial factory buildings in the background and wooden dock structures on both sides.

segments.scene_description: A massive paddlewheel steamboat looms into view through the fog on the left as the boat continues turning right. The scene is dominated by industrial dock warehouses on the right and factory chimneys in the background, with the camera navigating closely past the large moored vessel.

segments.scene_description: Having passed the large paddlewheel steamboat, the boat moves through a dense industrial dock area. Weathered dock buildings line the left side while warehouses stand on the right, with factory smokestacks dominating the skyline as the harbor opens up ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open, sun-drenched waters of a foggy harbor into the claustrophobic depths of a dense industrial dock. It begins with the small steam boat gliding toward a cluster of moored sailing ships, where a bright morning glare silhouettes tall masts and distant smokestacks through the heavy haze. As the boat turns right into a narrow channel, the intense sunlight fades, revealing weathered wooden docks and factory buildings that begin to crowd the periphery. The scene then shifts as a massive paddlewheel steamboat looms out of the fog on the left, forcing the camera to navigate closely between the hulking vessel and a row of industrial warehouses. Finally, the boat passes the steamboat and pushes through a corridor of weathered dock buildings and warehouses before the harbor opens up again beneath a skyline of dominating factory chimneys.
